data.body: WORKFLOW FIX (user-directed): completion verifier + close gate DO accept a source target — verify-completion --ref REF, and the close gate resolves ref via gate_source.default_ref() = REBAR_GATE_REF > [snapshot].ref > origin/main. Default origin/main caused my 'file does not exist' findings on unlanded code. GOING FORWARD: close tickets with REBAR_GATE_REF=HEAD before landing. No bug needed (feature exists; I was missing it). S2a/S2c remaining findings are ref-INDEPENDENT/genuine: S2a=live-check only (real Gerrit E2E, post-deploy); S2c=2 real code gaps (partial-land AUTOLANDER_ERROR+metric+hand_back; concrete import-rebar close) + live E2E. Plan: fix S2c code gaps (follow-up on 1ccf), build S3/S4/S5/S6 (close vs HEAD), deploy S5 + live E2E, attest live-checks, close bottom-up + epic.
